title: Jonquilla juncifolia
intro: Jonquilla juncifolia, also known as the Rush or Onion Grass, is a plant species that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Jonquilla juncifolia include alkaloids, saponins, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Jonquilla juncifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and bronchitis.
